name: T.N.C. Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: T.N.C. Industrial Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells coating raw materials and electronic chemicals for industrial applications worldwide. It offers a range of coating chemicals, including nitrocellulose, pigment, resin, etc. The company's nitrocellulose is used in coating, lacquer, printing ink, and various decorative films, as well as for wooden furniture, athletic facilities, cosmetics, metal, and leather products; pigments are used to make color of the surfaces and materials; and resin and derivatives are used for the adhesion of coating. It also offers electronic chemicals, such as process chemicals and mixed acids for semiconductor; display; and diode, solar cell, and LED industries. T.N.C. Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Taoyuan, Taiwan.
